use_cases: Animated background for landing pages and hero sections
Visual backdrop for SaaS dashboards and marketing sites
Ambient background for creative portfolio and media platforms
Decorative background for tech-focused product presentations
Stylized atmosphere for developer tools and documentation sites
ai_summary: Canvas-based animated background featuring flowing horizontal threads with sine wave patterns. The Digital Loom component renders continuously animating translucent threads on a configurable dark background, creating a woven digital aesthetic. Designed as a wrapper component that accepts children, making it suitable for overlaying content on animated backgrounds in landing pages, hero sections, or immersive web experiences.
